## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu planning session to structure content strategy and timeline for an ongoing project.](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy artifacts (V1) are foundational for all editorial content, including comparison pages and starter kit copy](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Project timeline roughly sketched: Week 1 (deep dives), Week 2 (foundation setting), Week 3 (execution start)](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Comparison pages identified as the first application of content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Team aims to present a clear, story-driven project plan in the upcoming leadership meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Initial content strategy draft completed, including Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [V1 artifacts created as foundational documents for editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Feedback on artifacts welcomed and encouraged](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Content strategy feeds into Atlas workspace for comprehensive integration](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

### Project Timeline Structure

  - [Week 1: Kickoff, deep dives, artifact generation, goal/timeline alignment](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Week 2: Setting foundation, artifact sign-off, aligning on overall content direction](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Week 3: Start execution, identify first project (likely comparison pages)](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Week 4: Calibrate editorial execution, continue with design and dev prototyping](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

### Comparison Pages

  - [Identified as a priority project](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Will be the first application of the content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [No significant progress made yet, but recognized as a key deliverable](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Leadership Meeting Preparation

  - [Aiming to present a clear, story-driven project plan](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Simple, domain-focused breakdown of projects preferred](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [George to break down work into clear streams for better visualization](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Collaboration and Knowledge Sharing

  - [Acknowledgment of the need for better information sharing among team members](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [George offered support and availability for questions or additional planning sessions](https://fathom.video/share/JGv-WePeEyL1CTm4yAH24TeFqrHm7wsy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
